script:
set +e
echo '=== stat aixa creds ==='
stat /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== where is aixa-responder.py now ==='
find /home -maxdepth 3 -name 'aixa-responder.py' 2>/dev/null
echo '=== CLAUDE constant in aixa responder ==='
grep -n 'CLAUDE\|claude.*bin\|/claude' /home/aixa/aixa-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo '=== aixa runs which claude ==='
sudo -u aixa bash -lc 'which claude; ls -la $(which claude) 2>&1; echo PATH=$PATH' 2>&1 | head -10
echo '=== aixa errors tail (correct path) ==='
tail -20 /home/aixa/.aixa-bot/responder-errors.log 2>&1
echo '===END==='
